summary: Tested 3-tier work readiness enforcement, Send Forms via Email, and Homepage repositioning. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - 3-tier status badges display correctly in employee list and profile, Send Form dropdown works with 4 form options, public form completion page handles invalid tokens gracefully, homepage shows care-sector messaging.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: EmailRequestService.validate_and_use_token() was being called with incorrect 'mark_clicked' parameter - removed invalid parameter
Fixed: EmailRequestService.create_request() was being called with invalid 'custom_message' and 'admin_notes' parameters - replaced with 'context' dict
Fixed: Employee detail endpoint was missing work_readiness_3tier field - added calculate_work_readiness_3tier_quick call
Fixed: Form completion endpoints were using .get() on EmailRequest dataclass objects - updated to handle both object attributes and dict fallback
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employees: Olakunle (d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77), Lawrence (ccfcbdbb-feda-4043-a8b2-2f1f9da88bdf)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-tier work readiness fully implemented. Statuses: NOT_READY (hard blocks like recruitment_not_approved, missing RTW/DBS/references), READY_WITH_CONDITIONS (overdue recurring compliance), READY_TO_WORK (all clear). Send Form via Email creates email request with token. Form completion at /forms/complete/:token (public route). Homepage repositioned with safer recruitment and care-sector messaging.

3tier_work_readiness_employee_list.details: Employee list shows 3-tier status badges (NOT_READY, READY_WITH_CONDITIONS, READY_TO_WORK) with color coding and first reason displayed

3tier_work_readiness_employee_profile.details: Employee profile header shows 3-tier badge with 'Not Ready to Work' and 'Recruitment not yet approved' reason

3tier_status_colors.details: Status colors match: NOT_READY=error/red, READY_WITH_CONDITIONS=warning/amber, READY_TO_WORK=success/green

send_form_dropdown.details: Send Form dropdown in What's Needed tab shows 4 form options: Health Questionnaire, Personal Details Form, HMRC Starter Checklist, Interview Record

send_form_api.details: Creates email request with token, validates form type, handles duplicates

public_form_completion_get.details: Returns form template and auto-fill data for valid tokens, rejects invalid tokens with 400

public_form_completion_post.details: Submits form data, creates form_submission record, links to requirement

public_form_completion_ui.details: Public form page shows 'Link Expired' message for invalid tokens with Go to Homepage button

homepage_repositioning.details: Homepage shows 'Safer Recruitment & Care Staffing Partner' badge, 'Safeguarded staffing for quality care delivery' headline, trust badges (DBS Verified, Right to Work Checked, References Confirmed, Training Tracked), Why care providers trust Osabea section

bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Removed mark_clicked parameter, updated response handling to check status field

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: EmailRequestService.create_request() called with invalid 'custom_message' and 'admin_notes' parameters
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Replaced with 'context' dict parameter and 'admin_id' parameter

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Employee detail endpoint missing work_readiness_3tier field
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added calculate_work_readiness_3tier_quick call to get_employee endpoint

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Form completion endpoints using .get() on EmailRequest dataclass objects
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Updated to use getattr() for object attributes with dict fallback from token_data
